title: 2026 Oscar-Nominated Filmmakers on Why They Chose Adobe
text: No Film School interviewed 2026 Oscar-nominated filmmakers about their choice of editing software and workflow. Several Best Film Editing nominees discussed using Adobe Premiere and related tools in their craft. The article highlighted how editing software choices impact efficiency and creative possibilities. Editors discussed the integration of multiple Adobe tools—Premiere for editing, After Effects for visual effects, and Frame.io for collaboration—in their post-production pipelines. The interviews revealed how modern editing technology facilitates the complex, iterative editorial process required for films of the scale and scope of the 2026 nominees. For instance, one editor discussed advantages of offline editing in Premiere that allowed a more polished finish than other tools. The article demonstrated the technical infrastructure behind Oscar-winning editing work.
